name: Valentine Cutouts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, dissolve gelatin in water; set aside for 30 minutes.
2. In a small bowl, whisk milk and pudding mix until smooth, about 1 minute.
3. Quickly pour the mixture into the gelatin; whisk until well blended.
4. Pour into an oiled 13x9x2-inch dish.
5. Chill until set.
6. Cut into cubes or use a heart-shaped cookie cutter.
Yield: 8-10 servings.
